set.body: One script: benchmark-block-lanczos.R. Currently guarded by an opt-in option so it produces no output by default. Rehab per contract: remove the opt-in, honor AMATRIX_BENCHMARK_NO_AUTORUN instead. Op: block_lanczos (already executed in benchmark-regression.R but not baselined and affected by BUG-02 warmup-in-switch <e2><80><94> blocked by P1 amatrix-42q).
set.title: Rehabilitate block-lanczos benchmark (block-lanczos)
